openingQuery: I'm looking for something linen for warm evenings out

chat.content: I'm looking for something linen for warm evenings out
Let me find some linen pieces perfect for warm evenings. I'll search our collection and check what's been trending.

toolCalls.description: Semantic search for linen evening wear
toolCalls.sql: SELECT name, brand, price, 1 - (embedding <=> $1) AS similarity FROM product_catalog WHERE category ILIKE '%linen%' ORDER BY embedding <=> $1 LIMIT 10;

toolCalls.description: Check trending items in linen category

confidence.reasoning: High confidence based on strong semantic match with user preferences for linen and warm-tone evening wear.

chat.content: Tell me more about the sundress — is it good for outdoor dinners?

The Sundress in Washed Linen is one of our most versatile evening pieces. The golden ochre color catches the light beautifully at golden hour, and the washed linen fabric breathes well even on the warmest nights. It's perfect for outdoor dinners — relaxed enough for a terrace but with enough presence for a candlelit table.

toolCalls.description: Detailed lookup for Sundress in Washed Linen
toolCalls.resultSummary: Product details retrieved with 4.8 rating, 23 reviews

confidence.reasoning: Direct product inquiry with strong match to stated occasion (outdoor dinners) and existing preference profile.

brief.headline: A linen evening, curated in four seconds

sections.title: The Request
paragraphs: Marco arrived with a simple ask: something linen for warm evenings out. Behind that six-word query, the system recognized a returning customer with three prior orders and a clear preference profile — minimal aesthetics, warm tones, and a deep affinity for linen.
The Dispatcher routed the request through three specialists in sequence: Search for semantic discovery, Recommendation for preference-weighted ranking, and Pricing for value verification.

sections.title: How We Found the Pieces
paragraphs: The Search agent executed a pgvector similarity query against 444 products, filtering for linen category items. Six candidates emerged with similarity scores above 0.78, led by the Sundress in Washed Linen at 0.91.
Trending data from the past seven days confirmed the sundress and camp shirt as popular choices, reinforcing the semantic results.

evidencePanel.sql: SELECT name, brand, price, 1 - (embedding <=> $1) AS similarity FROM product_catalog WHERE category ILIKE '%linen%' ORDER BY embedding <=> $1 LIMIT 10;

sections.title: Memory at Work
paragraphs: Long-term memory recalled Marco's stored preferences — minimal, warm tones, linen — which the Recommendation agent used to weight candidates. Short-term memory tracked the evolving conversation context, noting the shift from general browsing to specific interest in the sundress.

memoryRows.content: Prefers minimal, warm tones, linen (3 prior orders)
Looking for linen evening wear → interested in sundress for outdoor dining

sections.title: The Recommendations
paragraphs: Three pieces emerged from the ranking: the Sundress in Washed Linen ($148), the Italian Linen Camp Shirt ($128), and the Wide-Leg Linen Trousers ($98). Each scored highly on both semantic relevance and preference overlap.
The Pricing agent confirmed all three sit within Marco's typical spend range, with the sundress representing the strongest value proposition given its versatility.

sections.title: Confidence and Outcome
paragraphs: The system arrived at 87% confidence for the initial recommendation set, rising to 92% when Marco asked specifically about the sundress for outdoor dinners. The high confidence reflects strong alignment between the query, stored preferences, and product attributes.
